reviews.review_title: This is just for the flying things
reviews.review_description: This is a very good game, good mechanics, good replayability and also good challenge.
W game fr

￼ Just started playing the game no actual opinion on it yet. I’m leaving the review to unlock the different flight. Modes will update 

probably 


maybe 



unless something terrible happens. ￼


**EDIT:** perhaps the most anticipated review, in the history of reviews.

The Devs obviously genuine concern for my wellbeing shall not sway my principled and incorruptible review. 
Keep in mind i was marinated in the sauce of correctitude in my youth, therefore grains of salt are not necessary when digesting my reviews.

Positives are the direction i can see the game going, its pretty unique in sone aspects. The level is 
Gargantuan-tuan’tuan. There is a ton of space for the game to grow and develop in to the devs vision. The initial flight controls and physics are solid, theres nothing new and groundbreaking but there doesnt need to be because it just works.


Cons(so far) 
Another wave shooter? Other flight options not ready yet, lack of content due to early alpha stage so to be expected, still a risk as those who don’t understand the purpose of this early release may write the game off as trash badooky. 

Its really all about where the Devs take this project. 

I am honestly excited to see where this goes and im an older vr gamer so I am rarely excited by run of the mill copy and paste games.

developer_response.body:
Oh, it's quite anticipated.

Ok, here we go! As a fellow marinator in correctitude, I get you.

It is a ton of space, that we'll be continuosly adding to - but it's always a performance balance between reducing loading as much as possible, keeping the open world design, correct flight physics calculations and adding new elements to the world.

Flight has been built over the course of almost 3 years now, so yeah - it's good.

Cons:
Wave shooter! Haha, I like to say it's a bullet hell PVP/PVE flying FPS haha. But you're not wrong, we have waves the way they are for now because we have a lot to do, and wanted people to enjoy something while we keep at it. The core design will remain the same, basically defending the city and a score derived from that. 

But there will be other, more offensive modes in the future... stay tuned/

The other flight options, similar to the above, are also a work in progress. We decided to put early versions in there for testing, but they're also 50% finished.

I hope not too many people see this as a trash badooky! Haha, because we're pretty serious about it - and if I may - we are confident in our design abilities. We just need people to play and support for the next few months, make some more noise so we can find more investment to pay rent and keep going on this.

And finally, as an older VR gamer, I am also rarely excited for games in general anymore. Tired of the same formulas, over and over again... so yes, our intent is to make something awesome, sincere and completely new.

Thank you for taking the time to review, feedback and play. We hope you stick around and keep that feedback coming.

<3

Just needs a story mode
Sî
Its ok
So awesome

1) The details between buildings contrast so much. The majority of the buildings are gray primitive meshes with simple lines for detail. Then you have the Empire State Building, which is the only building that looks good, which has so much detail compared to the other buildings such that it looks like it doesn't even belong. Obviously the other buildings should be on par, since equalizing downward would be lazy.

2) Why are the bullets blue? How the hell am I supposed to see what I'm shooting if the bullets do not contrast with the sky (which usually makes up for a substantial part of the scene in the viewport)?

3) I have no idea how bird mode and the gravity pull spiderman thing are supposed to work. There are no examples or instructions that I could find.

4) What am I even supposed to do? Fly around and shoot primitive shapes out of the sky with bullets that I can't even see? This isn't even a game.

developer_response.body:
Hey, I don't like cookie dough either. I like cookies though! I hope you get the analogy :)

1) Our scale is 1:1 to Manhattan, that means.... a lot of buildings. And a huge open world. And the quest is not the most powerrful machine... glad you liked the Empire State Building at least! We wish the quest could support all buildings being this detailed, but no. We are most certainly not finished with the buildings, and we will find a better solution in the future - but we decided to start focusing on game modes and logic for now. Which brings us to...

2) Agreed haha, we're on it. We want the player to be able to chose the colors of their trail, shots, etc. 

3) Great point, since they're unfinished modes (for now) they're basically experimental. But we will add some instructions!

4) Fly, Soar, shoot the UAPs or other players! But I hear you, and yes this is obviously still in early access and we're updating every couple of weeks. Lots of updates being worked on, we are committed!

Hopefully you'll come back and reconsider your review once the cookie dough is... a cookie!

Peace my friend.

reviews.review_title: The best flight mechanism ever built
reviews.review_description:
I'm so happy that this game was recommended to me and I continue to spread the word non-stop.
I would be even more than happy to meet with the developers on a Zoom call to give my full feedback. I believe this could be one of the most enjoyable games ever made and my mind is blowing up at its potential.

I'm not sure I'll suggest things that haven't already been thought of, but I'd be happy to contribute my two cents' worth of thought.

developer_response.body:
We'll take you up on it! Join our discord, let's organize there! https://discord.gg/gjGbThc7 
We 100% agree with you, and we'd love your two cents. 
[instert welcome my boy gif]

I love this game I do want that punching update and I got on to see the new update I love it I do want wave mode multi-player because I want to teach my friends how to play the game on waves I can't wait for the update were you can get damaged and deflecting would be a nice touch I hope more enemies come to the game and this is definitely a 10/10 game already but when you spawn in you have a chance to go through the floor this is easily fixable though by flying up and I wonder when will hand tracking be back? I live this game and I made my friends play it and they love it too this is a good game more nice touches are being able to customize your hands and trail and to have shaders (I know your working on that) along with being able to fly through buildings and destroy them

developer_response.body:
And we love you! We're working on ALL of this - stay tuned! 
Hand tracking is back! Check the latest build, and activate it on the spawn area!

Customization coming in the coming weeks as well!! 

Thank you for your review, every little bit helps!

reviews.review_description: If your in the obsession of superhero’s and flying, this is an excellent way to relax. It’s so calming and the caves are so pretty you don’t care about the quite bland city. Only thing I would change is combat , get hand to hand combat with robots or whatever because it will make the game feel like you’re invincible.

developer_response.body: It is pretty relaxing right?! Also exciting if you want to, and activate defend the city! And the sphere game, etc. We're working on adding features to combat! Melee in particular! As well as ground enemies! Stay tuned, a lot coming in the future.

reviews.review_description: One thing wrong with this game, sometimes you just have some glitches and bugs, but he'll be fixing it soon. So overall, it's a really good game, that's really the only reason I gave it a 4 keep it going, you guys are really doing good on this game.

This game was great, though clearly in early development. I personally love the design of the invaders and would love some more variety! Some suggestions I have are “Tripod” based of war of the worlds, were instead of shooting a single blast it will shoot a continuous beam. It should also be grounded to prevent it from being to powerful, or a boss possibly. More fighters for the aliens pretty straight forwards. Another suggestion is Allied forces, like enlisting help of helicopters, fighter jets, etc. all of these features would be great in a sandbox and wave mode. Ok but on a serious note please don’t turn the game into only sandbox. And please add a story mode or something similar eventually. Other suggestions include Allied AA turrets, destruction of buildings even if simple, melee, and boss fights

developer_response.body:
Oh yes. Tripods! 100%, we're currently starting concept phase of ground enemies. Allied forces are a thing, if very simple for now; you can recruit an allied UAP as well as an Allied Turret to help you. 

On story mode, for sure - we have a great lore and worldbuilding we're slowly wrapping up for you - and will be delivering that during the course of the year.

Building destruction, also looking into that. The quest is not a very powerful machine, so it's kinda hard - but we'll see.

Melee and boss fights will be here soon I think. Early versions, and we'll iterate on them as we go on.

Thank you for your suggestions, we take them very seriously!

reviews.review_description: If I had a voice chat, would be much better ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks! We do have voice chat in the multiplayer servers, host a game and invite friends to join and you can talk as you fly around shooting each other!

reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely goated. This gave me 'Invincible" vibes. Play some feel it and fly around. And I was in love

You can see the direction of where it's going and it looks like it'll be INCREDIBLE! I found the speeds and gravity were a little off, so I changed the setting to gravity 100 and speed 250 and found this worked for both manoeuvres and speed! The weapons aren't supremely user friendly. Some more direction when using and a different mode for weapon selection would be great! The map is a good size but lacks detail. I'd personally love to see more super tall buildings with varying streets (not on a grid) to allow for some challenges when flying. Maybe the inclusion of night and day time aswell? But I really do love this and where it's going!

developer_response.body: ALL of that is on our list :) the next update, coming this next week ideally, will incluse some significant changes to the spawn area that you might appreciate. It won't be the last version by any means, but it'll be an improvement on what's there today. We're listening to the community feedback! On the maps, we're working on some cool stuff that should see the light of day soon. Night and day (and weather!) is something we've been investigating a lot. The limited processing power on the quest makes it *very* difficult (you'll notice there are no loading screens! By design of course) but we got a plan... stay tuned! And thank you for your feedback <33

reviews.review_description:
So far, there's no real format, guidance, or sense of direction. The visuals are primitive and lack any sense of cohesive design. It felt like playing asteroids while having a seizure.

The only interesting thing, which has potential, is the movement system. Everything else feels thrown together. This game is nowhere near ready for release, not even early. Good concept, but what is posted is more likely to scare players away from future consideration. It is just not ready to be seen. Its a concept, not a game.

developer_response.body:
Ah you see, we call it Soar Style :) but of course, a balance between enormous open world, no loading and well... small indie budget! There's a lot of work to do of course, but we're confident we'll get there. If only you could see where it was a year ago! 

Glad that you think the movement sytstem has potential. We believe so as well! So, bear with us while we work towards the grand vision, and perhaps come back in the future to reconsider your review.

Be at peace my friend, and thank you for taking the time to write this up!
